import { useEffect, useState } from "react"; import API from "../services/api"; import ExpenseChart from "../components/ExpenseChart"; import MonthlyTrendChart from "../components/MonthlyTrendChart"; import TransactionForm from "../components/TransactionForm"; import BudgetForm from "../components/BudgetForm"; import TransactionList from "../components/TransactionList"; function Dashboard() { const [summary, setSummary] = useState({ totalIncome: 0, totalExpense: 0, balance: 0, }); const [budget, setBudget] = useState(0); useEffect(() => { fetchDashboard(); }, []); const fetchDashboard = async () => { try { const token = localStorage.getItem( "token" ); // DASHBOARD SUMMARY const response = await API.get( "/dashboard", { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}`, }, } ); setSummary( response.data ); // BUDGET FETCH const budgetResponse = await API.get( "/budget", { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}`, }, } ); setBudget( Number( budgetResponse.data[0]?.amount ) ); } catch (error) { console.log(error); } }; return (

Smart Expense Tracker

{/* SUMMARY CARDS */}

Total Balance

₹{summary.balance}

Total Income

₹{summary.totalIncome}

Total Expense

₹{summary.totalExpense}

{/* EXPENSE CHART */}

Expense Analytics

{/* MONTHLY TREND */} {/* BUDGET ALERT */} { summary.totalExpense > budget && (
⚠ Budget Limit Exceeded!
) } {/* DEBUG VALUES */}

Budget: ₹{budget}

Expense: ₹{summary.totalExpense}

{/* FORMS */} {/* TRANSACTION LIST */}
); } export default Dashboard;
